idea.title: Orbit Dodge
idea.hook: A glowing ball orbits a core — tap to flip its spin and slip through the gap in each incoming ring. How far can you weave?
idea.hook_ru: Светящийся шарик летит по орбите вокруг ядра — нажми, чтобы сменить вращение и проскользнуть в щель каждого налетающего кольца. Как далеко ты сможешь?
idea.prototype: Vanilla-JS canvas PORTRAIT (393x852) one-button rotational dodge. A glowing marble auto-orbits a central core at fixed ORBIT_RADIUS; the ONLY input — tap / click / spacebar — instantly REVERSES its spin direction (clockwise <-> counter-clockwise). Rings spawn off-screen and shrink inward at RING_CLOSE_SPEED; each ring has ONE gap (GAP_ARC_DEG), evaluated exactly once as its radius crosses the orbit band (MARBLE_RADIUS + RING_THICK/2 of ORBIT_RADIUS). If the marble is inside the gap at that instant it passes (+score x combo); otherwise gs='GAMEOVER' (single life, no timer). The first two rings of a run spawn with their gap on/near the marble's current angle so a brand-new player sees clean passes and learns the mechanic before fully-random gaps begin. Difficulty escalates by tier (every TIER_RINGS=10 clean passes): faster close + orbit speed, faster spawn, narrower gap, then twin opposed gaps (tier 3+) and slowly rotating gaps (tier 5+); the ring + background palette swaps each tier for visible progress. Combo multiplier up to MAX_COMBO_MULT=8. bestScore + bestDistance persist in localStorage. MENU tutorial + in-game ? help panel in EN+RU, the whole screen is the tap zone (tap anywhere flips in PLAY, tap anywhere starts/retries on MENU/GAMEOVER), GF.persist save, gf-lib fullscreen-resize, no ads in v0.1.
idea.mutation_of: Daily Dodge (our #1 game) reflex-dodge family, reimagined as rotational orbit-flip dodge
idea.why_novel: rotational/timing dodge, distinct from our lateral lane-dodgers
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' the frame a ring's radius crosses the marble's orbit band (within MARBLE_RADIUS + RING_THICK/2 of ORBIT_RADIUS) while the marble is NOT inside that ring's gap. Single life; reachable from random play within ~60s (a no-input player passes the two gentle-opener rings then dies on the first random gap at ~10s).

sources.title: Daily Dodge — top retention 73.8s, dodge genre 100% liked
Geometry Dash Lite — reflex arcade, heat 0.97 validated demand

synthesizer_brief: Extend our top-retention dodge/reflex winner with a NEW rotational mechanic; bake in clear-5s-goal + mobile-portrait + real-depth from comment themes.

alternatives.title: Power-Wash Relay
alternatives.hook: Blast grime off in timed-pressure sweeps, chaining nozzles to keep a satisfying clean-streak alive.
alternatives.why_novel: a streak/relay cleaning loop with a held water-pressure resource rather than a free-paint cleaner

alternatives.title: Beatline Runner
alternatives.hook: A one-button rhythm runner where every tap must land on the beat to vault the next gap.
alternatives.mutation_of: Daily Dodge reflex family crossed with a rhythm timing layer
alternatives.why_novel: musical on-beat timing window instead of pure spatial dodge — reflex tied to audio cadence

alternatives.title: Parry Window
alternatives.hook: Time a single tap to parry each incoming strike in a tightening rhythm — miss the window and you fall.
alternatives.why_novel: a reaction-time parry on a defend-axis rather than a dodge-axis — read the tell, tap in the window

alternatives.title: Gap Stacker
alternatives.hook: Drop through the only gap in each falling layer; stack a perfect run as the gaps drift and shrink.
alternatives.mutation_of: dodge family crossed with a vertical-descent gauntlet
alternatives.why_novel: gravity-driven vertical gap threading rather than horizontal lane dodging or rotational orbit
